package validate

import (
	"fmt"
	"os/exec"
)

func CheckBeadExists(id string) (bool, error) {
	err := exec.Command("bd", "show", id, "--json").Run()
	if err != nil {
		if _, ok := err.(*exec.ExitError); ok {
			return false, nil
		}
		return false, fmt.Errorf("running bd show: %w", err)
	}
	return true, nil
}
